commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds non-mutating Proxmox readiness diagnostics, cluster-wide lease reconciliation and safer cleanup behavior, extensive regression coverage, and an opt-in redacted live lifecycle smoke workflow.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a standalone bug report. The PR adds a readiness capability while hardening several lifecycle failure classes, and it supplies focused tests plus a complete live Proxmox CLI run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The only concrete automated repair is mechanically removing the release-owned changelog line; the stricter ACL contract itself requires maintainer acceptance rather than code repair.

target.title: Add Proxmox readiness and live proof smoke
target.body:
## Summary

- add Proxmox doctor readiness checks for auth, node, storage, bridge, template, nextid, inventory, and non-mutating behavior
- harden Proxmox lease lifecycle cleanup so local lease residue is removed only after confirmed remote deletion, while missing required response data fails closed where mutation correctness depends on it
- add a PR-only live proof smoke script and docs for producing redacted Proxmox evidence without filing a GitHub issue

## Live Proxmox Proof

A local Proxmox VE lab was prepared with a template VM and scoped API-token ACLs for node, storage, SDN, and VM clone operations. The final opt-in live smoke ran through the public Crabbox CLI with redacted output:

```text
step=doctor status=pass log=<proof-dir>/doctor.redacted.log
step=list-before status=pass log=<proof-dir>/list-before.redacted.log
step=warmup status=pass log=<proof-dir>/warmup.redacted.log
step=status status=pass log=<proof-dir>/status.redacted.log
step=ssh-command status=pass log=<proof-dir>/ssh-command.redacted.log
step=stop status=pass log=<proof-dir>/stop.redacted.log
step=cleanup-dry-run status=pass log=<proof-dir>/cleanup-dry-run.redacted.log
step=cleanup status=pass log=<proof-dir>/cleanup.redacted.log
step=list-after status=pass log=<proof-dir>/list-after.redacted.log
classification=live_proof_complete proof_dir=<proof-dir>
```

The final `list-after` result was `[]`, and a direct Proxmox VM inventory check showed only the retained template VM after cleanup. Redacted proof logs were scanned for API tokens, token IDs, local home paths, credential filenames, raw URLs, raw IP addresses, and local temp SSH control paths; no matches were found in the retained redacted logs.

## Verification

- `gofmt -w $(git ls-files '*.go') && git diff --exit-code && go vet ./...`
- `go test -count=1 ./internal/providers/proxmox ./internal/cli`
- `node --test scripts/proxmox-build-template.test.js scripts/live-doctor-smoke.test.js scripts/proxmox-live-smoke.test.js`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- `scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `scripts/proxmox-live-smoke.sh` with `CRABBOX_PROXMOX_LIVE_SMOKE=1` and `CRABBOX_PROXMOX_LIVE_SMOKE_CLEANUP=1`: `classification=live_proof_complete`
- structured autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

No GitHub issue was created; this is PR-only evidence.
target.author: coygeek

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
